description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and defines CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest. Add a build stage containing a build job that runs the global before_script docker login, then executes docker build -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . and docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. Add a test stage with a test job that also runs docker login, pulls $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, runs docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE -m flake8 and docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE -m isort --check-only, and uses docker:dind and neo4j services. Add a release stage with a release-image job that runs only on the master branch, runs docker login, pulls $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, tags it to $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and pushes the release image. No caches or artifacts are defined.
